raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Context check-in","name":"What's been most on your mind in the last couple of weeks at work?","description":"Safe opener that lets Tom set context before any feedback lands.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"self_read","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Principal scope","name":"What does Principal scope mean to you on this team?","description":"Surfaces his current model of the role and whether it matches the team's expectations.","purpose":"topic","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Visible impact","name":"Where has your work changed a decision, a direction, or a dependency this cycle?","description":"Looks for concrete evidence of leverage beyond steady delivery.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Expectation alignment","name":"When a piece of work starts, how do you decide what needs aligning early?","description":"Tests his habit of setting expectations before execution gets locked in.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Judgment calls","name":"What judgment call have you made recently that affected other teams?","description":"Probes whether he is making the kind of calls that unblock beyond his immediate lane.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Question habit","name":"What stops you from asking more questions earlier?","description":"Gets at the behavior behind low question volume without assuming the cause.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Operating assumptions","name":"What assumptions are you still carrying from your last team?","description":"Checks for old patterns that may be shaping how he shows up here.","purpose":"topic","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Trust building","name":"How are you building trust with people outside your immediate team?","description":"Surfaces whether he is investing in broader relationships or staying inside a safe execution bubble.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next behavior","name":"What would you do differently on the next cross-team piece?","description":"Moves from diagnosis to one concrete behavior change in how he works across teams.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
